en_title: Ziyarat of Imam al-Husayn on the Day of Arafah

verses.en: All glory be to Allah before one and all!
All glory be to Allah after one and all!
All glory be to Allah with one and all!

verses.ar: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ يَبْقَىٰ رَبُّنَا ويَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
verses.en: All glory be to Allah; our Lord exists eternally while the all will vanish!

verses.ar: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ تَسْبِيحاً يَفْضُلُ تَسْبِيحَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ
verses.en: All glory be to Allah with such glorification that exceeds all the glorifications of those who glorify Him;
with much excellence that exceeds all others.

verses.ar: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ تَسْبِيحاً يَفْضُلُ تَسْبِيحَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ
verses.en: All glory be to Allah with such glorification that exceeds all the glorifications of those who glorify Him;
with much excellence that remains after all others.

verses.ar: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ تَسْبِيحاً يَفْضُلُ تَسْبِيحَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ
verses.en: All glory be to Allah with such glorification that exceeds all the glorifications of those who glorify Him;
with much excellence that is with all others.

verses.ar: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ تَسْبِيحاً يَفْضُلُ تَسْبِيحَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ
verses.en: All glory be to Allah with such glorification that exceeds all the glorifications of those who glorify Him;

verses.ar: فَضْلاً كَثِيراً لِرَبِّنَا ٱلْبَاقِي وَيَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
verses.en: with much excellence to our Lord Who shall exist eternally while all others will vanish.

verses.ar: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ تَسْبِيحاً لاَ يُحْصَىٰ وَلاَ يُدْرَىٰ
verses.en: All glory be to Allah with such glorification that is uncounted, unrealized,
unforgettable, unending,
unrelenting, and ceaseless.
All glory be to Allah with glorification that is as eternal as He is
and as remaining as He is in the years of the worlds,
the months of the ages, the days of the world,
and the hours of night and day.

verses.ar: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ أَبَدَ ٱلأَبَدِ وَمَعَ ٱلأَبَدِ
verses.en: All glory be to Allah incessantly and with eternity
that no number can describe it,
no eternity can stop it
and no eternity can interrupt it.
Blessed be Allah, the best of creators.
All praise be to Allah before one and all!
All praise be to Allah after one and all!
All praise be to Allah with one and all!

verses.ar: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ يَبْقَىٰ رَبُّنَا ويَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
verses.en: All praise be to Allah; our Lord exists eternally while the all will vanish!

verses.ar: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْداً يَفْضُلُ حَمْدَ ٱلْحَامِدِينَ
verses.en: All praise be to Allah with such praise that exceeds all the praise of those who praise Him;
with much excellence that exceeds all others.

verses.ar: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْداً يَفْضُلُ حَمْدَ ٱلْحَامِدِينَ
verses.en: All praise be to Allah with such praise that exceeds all the praise of those who praise Him;
with much excellence that remains after all others.

verses.ar: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْداً يَفْضُلُ حَمْدَ الْحَامِدِينَ
verses.en: All praise be to Allah with such praise that exceeds all the praise of those who praise Him;
with much excellence that is with all others.

verses.ar: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْداً يَفْضُلُ حَمْدَ ٱلْحَامِدِينَ
verses.en: All praise be to Allah with such praise that exceeds all the praise of those who praise Him;

verses.ar: فَضْلاً كَثيراً لِرَبِّنَا ٱلْبَاقِي وَيَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
verses.en: with much excellence to our Lord Who shall exist eternally while all others will vanish.

verses.ar: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْداً لاَ يُحْصَىٰ وَلاَ يُدْرَىٰ
verses.en: All praise be to Allah with such praise that is uncounted, unrealized,
unforgettable, unending,
unrelenting, and ceaseless.
All praise be to Allah with praise that is as eternal as He is
and as remaining as He is in the years of the worlds,
the months of the ages, the days of the world,
and the hours of night and day.

verses.ar: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ أَبَدَ ٱلأَبَدِ وَمَعَ ٱلأَبَدِ
verses.en: All praise be to Allah incessantly and with eternity
that no number can describe it,
no eternity can stop it,
and no eternity can interrupt it.
Blessed be Allah, the best of creators.

verses.ar: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ قَبْلَ كُلِّ أَحَدٍ
verses.en: There is no god save Allah before one and all!

verses.ar: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ بَعْدَ كُلِّ أَحَدٍ
verses.en: There is no god save Allah after one and all!

verses.ar: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ مَعَ كُلِّ أَحَدٍ
verses.en: There is no god save Allah with one and all!

verses.ar: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ يَبْقَىٰ رَبُّنَا ويَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
verses.en: There is no god save Allah; our Lord exists eternally while the all will vanish!

verses.ar: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ تَهْلِيلاً يَفْضُلُ تَهْلِيلَ ٱلْمُهَلِّلِينَ
verses.en: There is no god save Allah with such confession of godhead that exceeds all the confessions of those who confess His godhead;
with much excellence that exceeds all others.

verses.ar: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ تَهْلِيلاً يَفْضُلُ تَهْلِيلَ ٱلْمُهَلِّلِينَ
verses.en: There is no god save Allah with such confession of godhead that exceeds all the confessions of those who confess His godhead;
with much excellence that remains after all others.

verses.ar: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ تَهْلِيلاً يَفْضُلُ تَهْلِيلَ ٱلْمُهَلِّلِينَ
verses.en: There is no god save Allah with such confession of godhead that exceeds all the confessions of those who confess His godhead;
with much excellence that is with all others.

verses.ar: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ تَهْلِيلاً يَفْضُلُ تَهْلِيلَ ٱلْمُهَلِّلِينَ
verses.en: There is no god save Allah with such confession of godhead that exceeds all the confessions of those who confess His godhead;

verses.ar: فَضْلاًَ كَثيراً لِرَبِّنَا ٱلْبَاقِي وَيَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
verses.en: with much excellence to our Lord Who shall exist eternally while all others will vanish.

verses.ar: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ تَهْلِيلاً لاَ يُحْصَىٰ وَلاَ يُدْرَىٰ
verses.en: There is no god save Allah with such confession of His godhead that is uncounted, unrealized,
unforgettable, unending,
unrelenting, and ceaseless.

verses.ar: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ تَهْلِيلاً يَدُومُ بِدَوَامِهِ
verses.en: There is no god save Allah with such confession that is as eternal as He is
and as remaining as He is in the years of the worlds,
the months of the ages, the days of the world,
and the hours of night and day.

verses.ar: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ أَبَدَ ٱلأَبَدِ وَمَعَ ٱلأَبَدِ
verses.en: There is no god save Allah incessantly and with eternity
that no number can describe it,
no eternity can stop it,
and no eternity can interrupt it.
Blessed be Allah, the best of creators.
Allah is the Greatest before one and all!
Allah is the Greatest after one and all!
Allah is the Greatest with one and all!

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ يَبْقَىٰ رَبُّنَا ويَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
verses.en: Allah is the Greatest; our Lord exists eternally while the all will vanish!

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ تَكْبِيراً يَفْضُلُ تَكْبِيرَ ٱلْمُكَبِّرِينَ
verses.en: Allah is the Greatest with such greatness that exceeds all the magnification of those who confess His All-greatness;
with much excellence that exceeds all others.

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ تَكْبِيراً يَفْضُلُ تَكْبِيرَ ٱلْمُكَبِّرِينَ
verses.en: Allah is the Greatest with such greatness that exceeds all the magnification of those who confess his All-greatness;
with much excellence that remains after all others.

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ تَكْبِيراً يَفْضُلُ تَكْبِيرَ ٱلْمُكَبِّرِينَ
verses.en: Allah is the Greatest with such greatness that exceeds all the magnification of those who confess his All-greatness;
with much excellence that is with all others.

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ تَكْبِيراً يَفْضُلُ تَكْبِيرَ ٱلْمُكَبِّرِينَ
verses.en: Allah is the Greatest with such greatness that exceeds all the magnification of those who confess his All-greatness;

verses.ar: فَضْلاً كَثيراً لِرَبِّنَا ٱلْبَاقِي وَيَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
verses.en: with much excellence to our Lord Who shall exist eternally while all others will vanish.

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ تَكْبِيراً لاَ يُحْصَىٰ وَلاَ يُدْرَىٰ
verses.en: Allah is the Greatest with such greatness that is uncounted, unrealized,
unforgettable, unending,
unrelenting, and ceaseless.
Allah is the Greatest with such greatness that is as eternal as He is
and as remaining as He is in the years of the worlds,
the months of the ages, the days of the world,
and the hours of night and day.

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ أَبَدَ ٱلأَبَدِ وَمَعَ ٱلأَبَدِ
verses.en: Allah is the Greatest incessantly and with eternity
that no number can describe it,
no eternity can stop it,
and no eternity can interrupt it.
Blessed be Allah, the best of creators.
